mapper.sql: select id, holder_name, person_code, card_type, decimal_code, epc_code, issue_time, card_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,user_id from card_issue
mapper.select: select count(1) from card_issue where person_code = #{personCode}
select count(1) from card_issue where person_code = #{personCode} and card_status = '1'
mapper.insert: insert into card_issue ( holder_name, person_code, card_type, decimal_code, epc_code, issue_time, card_status, create_by, remark, user_id, create_time ) values ( #{holderName}, #{personCode}, #{cardType}, #{decimalCode}, #{epcCode}, #{issueTime}, #{cardStatus}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, #{userId}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from card_issue where id in
#{id}

delete from card_issue where user_id in
#{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT concat ( ci.holder_name, '(', su.user_number, ')' ) FROM card_issue ci LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ci.person_code = su.user_name AND su.del_flag = '0' WHERE ci.epc_code LIKE concat('%',#{epcCode}, '%') limit 1
